readiness.notes: Multiple catalog SKUs listed with specified weights and dimensions, ORDER NOW button present; also offers custom engineering services as a secondary mode.

unresolved_questions: NDAA compliance status not disclosed (Austrian company, likely not applicable)
tagline: Austrian component supplier producing autonomous parachute recovery systems (DRS-5 through DRS-25) and flight-termination systems for multicopters 2–250 kg MTOW, plus platform-specific variants for DJI, Freefly, Aurelia, and others. Non-pyrotechnic, reusable, lightweight designs in production. ASTM F3322 compliant; Auterion partner. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown. Public evidence does not clearly establish current US defense or federal procurement footprint.
